goal: Split and coordinate current P8 task-pull hardening work by role and module.
acceptance: Every active module has a context pack and module plan.
Every atomic todo has allowed files, forbidden scope, acceptance criteria, and a verification signal.
High-noise verification is represented as a Verifier todo with external log paths.
Shared lifecycle/API/default-off contract changes have a Reviewer todo.
Integration readiness is represented as a distinct Integrator todo.
